resources.string: No internet connection. Please check your network.
Connection timed out. Please try again.
Cannot reach server. Please check your connection.
Invalid request. Please review your input.
Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
You don\'t have permission to do this.
The requested resource was not found.
Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
Server error (%1$d). Please try again later.
Conflict detected. Please refresh and try again.
An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
Error parsing response. Please try again.
Storage is full. Please free up space and try again.
